notes: Q3.5-4B is exceptionally stable on this image: 14 of 15 responses contain a perfectly accurate, complete 11-class schedule (all days, times, names, and sub-notes correct) and differ only in markdown layout — these all earn 9 (docked one point only for omitting the poster title and colour-coding, which the prompt did not explicitly require). The sole outlier is t0.7|rep4, which fabricates an 'Activity Type' column (inferred colour-group labels, several wrong: OSTEOPOROSIS→Fitness, TAIJI→Shaolin) and drops the day structure, scoring 5. No response hallucinated any non-existent class or time — the worst failure mode present is structural/labeling, not fabricated schedule content. Temperature had no meaningful effect on accuracy.
